name: Disable Template option on a part removes the Variants tab
steps:
Given a part 'Widget Base' is marked as a Template part and has no existing variants
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Widget Base'
When the user clicks the 'Details' tab and toggles the 'Template' option to off (slider to the left, grey)
Then the part detail page for 'Widget Base' shows the 'Template' attribute as disabled and the 'Variants' tab is no longer visible

name: Enable Template option on a part via the Details tab
steps:
Given a part 'Widget Base' is not currently marked as a Template part
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Widget Base'
When the user clicks the 'Details' tab
When the user locates the part options on the right-hand side and toggles the 'Template' option so it shows green (slider to the right)
Then the part detail page for 'Widget Base' shows the 'Template' attribute as enabled and the 'Variants' tab becomes visible
